title: paphinia neudeckeri
intro: Paphinia neudeckeri, also known as the 'Paphinia' or 'Queen of the Andes', is a species of orchid native to the tropical Andes. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paphinia neudeckeri are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Paphinia neudeckeri is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that are used to treat various health conditions.
